creator: jdowdal@destiny.erols.com
text:
"man ceil" returns:
SYNOPSIS
     #include <math.h>

     double
     ceil(double x)

     float
     ceil(float x)

which shows the same name for both doubles and floats, which is wrong.
The float version needs to change to 'ceilf'.

Fix: Diffs for /usr/src/lib/msun/man/ceil.3
===================================================================
RCS file: RCS/ceil.3,v
retrieving revision 1.1
How-To-Repeat: 
	

see above
